content.full_text:
January 11, 1990

Mr. Jeevan Ahuja  
Legal Counsel  
Fair Political Practices Commission  
428 J Street, Suite 800  
Sacramento, CA 95814

Dear Mr. Ahuja:

In response to my question you advised me that Senator Roberti may use campaign funds to host a farewell dinner for Senator Campbell who retired from the Senate on December 1989.

Can you please confirm that this is your opinion?

Sincerely,

[Signature]
CHRISTINE KOCKINIS  
Associate Director
